skills.name: Healing Factor
skills.description: Grants the designated party member with regenerative abilities. The target recovers HP if the target's HP is below that of what was left when they received the buff.
skills.effect_text:
Heal Factor: CaptionRatio % per 5 seconds
Duration: 45 seconds

skills.name: Incineration
skills.description: Incinerates enemies affected by debuffs. The duration and final damage of Incineration increase depending on the number of debuffs applied to enemy. The increased damage cannot exceed over 50%.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Targets: CaptionRatio
Final Damage + [Number of debuff x 10]%
Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Fumigate
skills.description: Spray a cloud of antidote that cures max. 3 status ailments of an ally. Allies within the effect will be cured of all removable debuffs except for stun, bind, immobility, and slow.
skills.effect_text:
Removes removable debuffs
Applied up to CaptionRatio
[Fumigate: Perfusion] Skill factor: SkillFactor %
[Fumigate: Perfusion] target(s): CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Pandemic
skills.description: Spread all the debuffs of enemies within range to other nearby enemies, and the enemies in the range of Pandemic get [Panic] debuff.

skills.name: Beak Mask
skills.description: Equip the Bird Beak Mask. The front side of the mask contains a special drug that blocks all removable debuffs except for stun, bind, immobility, and slow.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Educational Games
Dictionaries & Encyclopedias
Outerwear
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
100% immunity against all removable debuffs

skills.name: Black Death Steam
skills.description: Spread Black Death Steam around and deal continuous damage and reduces Critical Resistance. The affected targets infect poison to other targets nearby by chance. Increases Incineration damage when Incinerate on the target.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per second
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Critical Resistance - CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Modafinil
skills.description: Momentarily increases movement speed for you and your party members. An additional ratio is applied to those under the Modafinil buff, depending on the target's character level and the caster's SPR (maximum +100%).
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed: + CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

attributes.name: Incineration: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Incineration] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fumigate: Purification
attributes.description:
* The range of [Fumigate] becomes a purification area for 10 seconds

* Increases allies' poison resistance by 10% per attribute level

Increases chance of resisting removable debuff by 50%

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Black Death Steam: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Black Death Steam] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Incineration: Infect
attributes.description:
* When an enemy is defeated by [Incinerate], it transfers its debuff to a nearby enemy

* Increases the number of possible targets by 1 per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 40%

attributes.name: Pandemic: Spread Incineration
attributes.description:
* Adds a 5% chance per attribute level for [Pandemic] to spread [Incineration]

Chance applies to each target individually

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Modafinil: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Modafinil]'s movement speed increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Healing Factor: Heal Party
attributes.description:
* [Healing Factor]'s effects are applied to all party members. Increases the duration of Healing Factor to 10 seconds while the skill interval is reduced to 2.5 seconds

* Only 60% of the caster's Heal Factor is applied to party members.

attributes.name: [Arts] Healing Factor: Close Healing
attributes.description:
* Increases the buff duration of [Healing Factor] to 120 seconds, and the HP recovery cap is removed, but the continous healing effect only applies while the caster and target are close to one another. (Range: 100)

* The caster cannot apply [Healing Factor] to themself, and the duration of [Healing Factor: Heal Party] doesn't apply.

attributes.name: [Arts] Incineration: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Incineration] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Black Death Steam: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Black Death Steam] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Fumigate: Sanitize
attributes.description:
* When the debuff is removed by [Fumigate], the target recovers HP by [number of debuff removed x 10]%

* Increases SP consumption by 500%

attributes.name: [Arts] Bird Beak Mask: White Mask
attributes.description:
* Wears the white Bird Beak Mask

* Original effect removes and damage the enemy by puffing out the poison when using the Black Death Steam while wearing the mask

* Lasts for 7 seconds and factor is same as Black Death Steam

attributes.name: Fumigate: Perfusion
attributes.description:
* Removes the original function of [Fumigate]

* When casting [Fumigate], sprays vapor around the caster to damage the enemies within range every 1 second for 10 seconds and removes 1 beneficial effect.

* Decreases Cooldown by 15 seconds

attributes.name: Fumigate: Perfusion Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fumigate: Perfusion] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fumigate: Perfusion Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Fumigate: Perfusion] by 1.25% per attribute level
